items.title: Chelsea ‘to hijack another huge European transfer as they target record-breaking World Cup star as Garnacho replacement’
items.summary: CHELSEA have reportedly set their sights on Bayer Leverkusen teenager Kerim Alajbegovic. The 18-year-old Alajbegovic may be the perfect replacement after Alejandro Garnacho underperformed last season. items.title: Santos debuts as Man Utd kick off preseason vs Wrexham LIVE!
Will the World Cup affect Arsenal's transfer plans?
items.summary: With the World Cup final taking place on Sunday and the start of the Premier League just over a month away, supporters are starting to think about how their side is shaping up for the new campaign.

items.title: Man Utd unveil never-before-seen addition on BACK of jersey for first pre-season game vs Wrexham
items.summary: Manchester United will debut a new addition to their kit during their pre-season friendly against Wrexham. items.title: Lehmann: Langer would be 'really good' in England Test coach role
items.summary: Darren Lehmann revealed he has not been contacted about becoming England's next Test head coach, before endorsing fellow Australian Justin Langer for the vacant position.

items.title: Huge rise in harmful social media posts this World Cup
items.summary: There have been 14 times more harmful social media posts and comments during this World Cup than in 2022, Fifa finds.
